title: Sex Mex Music Discs (Datapack)
description: A datapack that aids in changing all music discs to be songs by the San Antonio Synth-Punk band Sex Mex.
body:
NOTE: I HAVE EXPLICIT PERMISSION FROM SEX MEX TO RELEASE THIS.

# Sex Mex Music Discs (Datapack)
### A companion datapack to the resource pack of the same name

![The thumbnail.](https://file.garden/Ze5pQjHwPg7iwG8C/SexMexMusicDiscs_Datapack.png)

This datapack was created to work with [Sex Mex Music Discs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sex-mex-music-discs-resource-pack), as in 1.21 some changes were made to music discs, as they now empty into hoppers from jukeboxes when their duration (determined by a datapack) is up. However, for resource packs that change the disc music it means they now need accompanying discs so some songs don't get cut off or have too much blank time after.

If this is you're first time hearing about Sex Mex, here's their linktree (which goes to their bandcamp, streaming profiles, and instagram): [https://linktr.ee/sexmexsux](https://linktr.ee/sexmexsux)

Do note some songs have *gasp* naughty words and adult themes, so if you're not familar with the band err on the side of caution.
